sections.label: THINKING
sections.content: I need to continue moving the magenta square toward the grabber. Let me write a loop that keeps clicking until the magenta reaches the grabber or the level completes.

sections.label: TOOL CALL: python
sections.content:
<tool_call>
<function=python>
<parameter=code>
# Loop to move magenta square to grabber
max_iters = 30
for i in range(max_iters):
    seg = current_frame.segmentation['nodes']
    magenta = [n for n in seg if n['color'] == 'M' and n['boundary'][0][0] > 10]
    grabber = [n for n in seg if n['color'] == 'p' and n['pixels'] == 9]
    
    if not magenta or not grabber:
        print(f"Iter {i}: magenta or grabber disappeared!")
        break
    
    mr, mc = magenta[0]['boundary'][0]
    gr, gc = grabber[0]['boundary'][0]
    print(f"Iter {i}: Magenta at ({mr},{mc}), Grabber at ({gr},{gc})")
    
    # Check if magenta is adjacent to grabber
    dist = abs(mr - gr) + abs(mc - gc)
    if dist <= 4:  # close enough
        print("Magenta reached grabber!")
        break
    
    # Click on magenta center
    click_r, click_c = mr + 1, mc + 1
    result = action([{'action': 'MOUSE', 'row': click_r, 'col': click_c}])
    
    if last_action_result.get('level_completed') or last_action_result.get('done'):
        print("Level completed!")
        break
</parameter>
</function>
</tool_call>
